name: Squash Amaranth Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the cooked Amaranth.
2. Mix all ingredients in a medium bowl.
3. Cook over medium-high heat.
4. Drop by tablespoon into a preheated skillet with a non-stick surface or lightly oiled.
5. Flatten patties with a spatula and allow to cook on the first side until the patty will stay together well before turning.
6. Brown both sides.
